race.comment: Hard to go past BLAMEITONTHEBOOGIE (1). Wasn't the best away but quickly secured the box seat then stride right away in a track gallop this course distance and class last time. Can only be fitter again. Cody Jodi has been aboard every start which now reads three wins and four minors from seven runs. The benchmark. RUNAWAY STATEMENT (5) resumes off a long break and presents fitter for two trials. Has won fresh and looks the danger. GARCON D'ESPOIR (2) didn't make an impact at his last run before going for a spell on January 7, finishing 11th and beaten 7 lengths over 1880m at this track. Definite top-three chance. PLATINUM REGGAE (8) is going well and was no match for the favourite last time but can sneak into the finish again.
